MOORE
SOME EXPERTS SPECULATE THAT MOORE'S LAW WILL CEASE TO HOLD TRUE AROUND 2025 TO 2030 AS PHYSICAL LIMITS OF SILICON TRANSISTORS ARE REACHED AND HEAT DISSIPATION BECOMES A CRITICAL BOTTLENECK.
***
OTHER ANALYSTS ARGUE THAT THE LAW WILL NOT STOP BUT RATHER EVOLVE THROUGH NEW MATERIALS LIKE GRAPHENE OR THREE DIMENSIONAL STACKING TECHNIQUES THAT SUSTAIN THE TREND OF DOUBLING COMPUTATIONAL POWER WITHOUT RELYING ON TRADITIONAL PLANAR SCALING.
MOORE
